title: Point Blank: Jelly — Counter-Strike
description: Point Blank: Jelly addon that adds weapons from Counter-Strike game series
body:
![pbj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3a1e3c19f1de5e770db8d0ec2139e3d9da727ce.png)
# Requires Point Blank: Jelly

This extension will add all weapons from Counter Strike games, such as Counter-Strike1.6, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero Deletet scenes, Counter-Strike: Source, Counter-Strike: Global Offensive/Counter-strike 2. 
The main goal during the creation of the extension was to adhere as much as possible to the original VPB artstyle.
